notes: Independent 501(c)(3) research institute founded 2019, focused specifically on machine-learning security — 'building security in to machine learning technology itself.' Founders include Gary McGraw. Produces architectural risk analyses of ML/LLM systems (see the reference record secid:reference/berryvilleiml.com for BIML-78 and the 2024 LLM risk analysis). A research institute, not a multi-organization consortium.
